summary: Variants in FHF2/FGF13 have not been shown to be associated with encephalopathy according to available literature; despite general roles for FGFRs in neurodevelopment, direct links to human encephalopathic phenotypes remain absent. No supporting evidence was found linking these particular variants to encephalopathy among reviewed sources.
